description: Shades the enclosed region between two plotted curves, automatically computing intersection boundaries. Used for visualizing definite integrals and area comparisons between functions.
utility: Shade the area between two curves on a 2D graph

arguments.name: plot1
arguments.description: First plot variable - the upper or lower curve

arguments.name: plot2
arguments.description: Second plot variable - the other bounding curve

arguments.name: fillColor
arguments.description: Fill color using fc() expression - e.g., fc(purple). Default is blue

arguments.name: fillOpacity
arguments.description: Fill opacity from 0 to 1 using fo() expression - e.g., fo(0.3). Default is 0.3

alternates.syntax:
f = plot(G, "f(x)")
g = plot(G, "g(x)")
areabetween(G, f, g)
alternates.description: Shade the region between f and g with default styling

alternates.syntax:
f = plot(G, "f(x)")
g = plot(G, "g(x)")
areabetween(G, f, g, fc(purple))

alternates.variant: With custom fill color and opacity
alternates.syntax:
f = plot(G, "f(x)")
g = plot(G, "g(x)")
areabetween(G, f, g, fc(purple), fo(0.5))
alternates.description: Shade with custom fill color and opacity

examples.scenario: Area between two implicit parabolas with intersection points
examples.expression:
graph_1 = g2d(at(2,5), 21.8, 20.2, range(-5, 5, 1), type(plotting), grid())
plot_1=plot(graph_1,"x^2 = 4y")
plot_2=plot(graph_1,"y^2 = 4x")
area_1 = areabetween(graph_1, plot_2, plot_1, -2, 2)
point_1 = intersect(graph_1, plot_2, plot_1, 1)
point_2 = intersect(graph_1, plot_2, plot_1, 2)

examples.scenario: Area between 3x squared and sin(x)+3 with green fill and opacity
examples.expression:
G=g2d(at(4,19),19.1,19.6,range(-5,5,1),range(-5,5,1),type(plotting))
P1 = plot(G, "3x^2")
P2 = plot(G, "sin(x) + 3")
A = areabetween(G, P1, P2, fc(green), fo(0.2))

examples.scenario: Area between two curves with default styling
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(2,2), 30, 30, type(plotting))
f = plot(G, "x^2")
g = plot(G, "x")
areabetween(G, f, g)

examples.scenario: Area between sine and cosine with purple fill
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(2,2), 30, 30, type(plotting))
f = plot(G, "sin(x)")
g = plot(G, "cos(x)")
areabetween(G, f, g, fc(purple), fo(0.4))
